text:
is a single by Yoko Takahashi. The single was published by King Records via its label STARCHILD with the catalog number KICM-1440, it was released on 27 March 2013. https://vgmdb.net/album/37376 It contains the theme song of the Pachislot EVANGELION machine. The second track is a cover of a Moro Fukuzawa song Yoko Takahashi interview at Billboard JAPAN (Japanese) . The cover was illustrated by Mahiro Maeda.

Track 01
Composition: Toshiyuki Ohmori
Lyrics: Neko Oikawa
Arrangements: Toshiyuki Ohmori
Vocals: Yoko Takahashi

Track 02
Composition: Moro Fukuzawa
Lyrics: Moro Fukuzawa
Arrangements: Masanori Sasaji
Vocals: Yoko Takahashi
